source.business_scenario: GROUP BY + ORDER BY 组合排序
source.redaction_notes: Synthetic Pagila schema; no real customer data

input.sql:
SET work_mem = '128kB';
SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(amount) AS total
FROM payment
GROUP BY customer_id
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 20;
RESET work_mem
input.explain_output:
-- @id: Q26

-- @severity: warning
-- @scenario: GROUP BY + ORDER BY 组合排序
SET work_mem = '128kB';
SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(amount) AS total
FROM payment
GROUP BY customer_id
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 20;
RESET work_mem;

Limit  (cost=424.79..424.84 rows=20 width=50) (actual time=9.712..9.716 rows=20 loops=1)
  ->  Sort  (cost=424.79..426.28 rows=599 width=50) (actual time=9.709..9.711 rows=20 loops=1)
        Sort Key: (sum(amount)) DESC
        Sort Method: top-N heapsort  Memory: 27kB
        ->  HashAggregate  (cost=402.86..408.85 rows=599 width=50) (actual time=9.397..9.538 rows=599 loops=1)
              Group By Key: customer_id
              ->  Partition Iterator  (cost=0.00..282.49 rows=16049 width=10) (actual time=0.017..3.616 rows=16049 loops=1)
                    Iterations: 7
                    ->  Partitioned Seq Scan on payment  (cost=0.00..282.49 rows=16049 width=10) (actual time=0.044..2.131 rows=16049 loops=7)
                          Selected Partitions:  1..7
Total runtime: 9.878 ms
